traits.label: Reforestation & biodiversity mission
traits.detail: Wealth from a sustainable-agriculture exit; runs a reforestation foundation. Wants capital to reward companies that take real, measurable action to protect ecosystems — and to be told when a holding does something magnificent, not only when one drops.

evidence.quote: I want to actively penalize companies that treat nature as a free resource. Our portfolio must prioritize businesses that proactively protect natural ecosystems.
She highly respects corporations that go beyond simple carbon offsets and actually invest in physical, measurable rainforest restoration and indigenous land protection.

If a company takes a brave, absolute stance against palm oil deforestation and actively puts money into reforestation, that is exactly where my money should be. ... call me when a company I own actually does something magnificent for the planet.

traits.label: Demands verified supply-chain transparency
traits.detail: Prefers verified supply chains over greenwashed metrics; sceptical of conglomerates hiding deforestation behind shell suppliers.

evidence.quote: Many global conglomerates claim they are sustainable, but they are still buying from suppliers hiding behind shell companies to clear rainforests for palm oil.
